info.name: Nova.ToDo.Api
info.description: ToDo API endpoints covering task and to-do item management.

item.name: ToDo
Pre-Edit Gets

request.description:
Returns the full ToDo record for the given seq_no, regardless of frz_ind.

updated_at field: stores the client IP address of the last mutation (legacy schema — not a timestamp).

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{

request.description:
Returns the full ToDo record for a task-source lookup. Exactly one of travel_pnr_no, seq_no_charges, seq_no_acct_notes, or itinerary_no must be provided (plus done_ind = false). Returns 400 if zero or more than one task-source field is populated.

Does not filter on frz_ind.

updated_at field: stores the client IP address of the last mutation (legacy schema — not a timestamp).

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

request.description:
Partial update. Send only the fields being changed plus updated_on for concurrency. Task-source fields (travel_pnr_no, seq_no_charges, seq_no_acct_notes, itinerary_no) are immutable and ignored if sent. If submitted data is identical to DB, returns 204.

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

response.name: 204 No Content — No Changes (Submitted Data Identical to DB)
400 Bad Request — Missing updated_on
401 Unauthorised
404 Not Found
409 Concurrency Conflict
422 Unprocessable Entity — Lookup Validation Failed
500 Internal Server Error

request.description:
Hard delete — permanently removes the record. updated_on required for concurrency check.

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

response.name: 200 OK
400 Bad Request — Missing updated_on
401 Unauthorised
404 Not Found
409 Concurrency Conflict
500 Internal Server Error

request.description:
Freeze (frz_ind: true) or unfreeze (frz_ind: false) the record. One route for both directions. Returns 422 if freeze is called on an already-frozen record.

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

response.name: 400 Bad Request — Missing Required Fields
401 Unauthorised
404 Not Found
409 Concurrency Conflict
422 Unprocessable Entity — Already Frozen
500 Internal Server Error

request.description:
Marks the task as complete. done_on is server-set. Returns 422 if task is already completed.

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

response.name: 400 Bad Request — Missing done_by
401 Unauthorised
404 Not Found
409 Concurrency Conflict
422 Unprocessable Entity — Task Already Completed
500 Internal Server Error

request.description:
Reverses a completed task. Clears done_by and done_on (set to null); sets done_ind to false.

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "seq_no": "1042",
  "done_ind": false,
  "done_by": null,
  "done_on": null,
  "updated_on": "2026-04-03T15:10:00+00:00"
}

response.name: 400 Bad Request — Missing updated_on
401 Unauthorised
404 Not Found
409 Concurrency Conflict
500 Internal Server Error

item.name: Lists
item.description:
All list queries filter frz_ind = 0 by default. Pass include_frozen: true (rights-controlled) to remove this filter.

All list endpoints support pagination via page_no and page_size. The API fetches page_size + 1 records; if count equals page_size + 1, set has_next_page: true and discard the last record.

Joined description fields are included in each list item to avoid extra round-trips. The join SQL differs per DB engine — a placeholder comment marks this in the implementation.

// Rights check placeholder: requires List right. Nova.Shared handles JWT validation; domain-level rights checks added during .NET code generation.

Pagination uses 1-based page_no. Note: uses page_no (not page_number) — intentional divergence from Nova.Shell.Api PagedRequest convention.

item.name: Aggregates
item.description:
Summary / aggregate endpoints. All exclude frozen records (frz_ind = 0). 'Today' is calculated per tenant timezone using browser_timezone from the auto-injected context — UTC datetime bounds are derived server-side.

// Rights check placeholder: domain-level rights checks added during .NET code generation.

request.description:
Returns task counts for a given assignee:
  - Tasks due today (split by priority H/N/L)
  - Overdue tasks (split by priority H/N/L)
  - WIP tasks (done_ind = 0 and start_date is set)
  - Tasks due today and created today
  - Completed today

'Today' derived from browser_timezone UTC bounds (server-side).

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

response.name: 200 OK
400 Bad Request — Missing assigned_to_user_code
401 Unauthorised
500 Internal Server Error

request.description:
Returns task counts for a given context. Exactly one context group must be populated:
  - bkg_no
  - quote_no
  - account_code_client
  - supplier_code
  - tour_series_code + dep_date (both required together)

Returns 400 if zero or more than one context group is populated.

Completed tasks scope varies by filter type:
  - bkg_no / quote_no / tour_series_code+dep_date: all completed tasks (all time)
  - account_code_client: completed for open enquiries, open quotes, and bookings up to 15 days after return date (window from opsettings.json)
  - supplier_code: completed for last 30 days (window from opsettings.json)

// Placeholder: inline join queries for account_code_client and supplier_code scopes to be written manually.

Auto-injected (do not set manually): tenant_id, company_code, branch_code, user_id, browser_locale, browser_timezone, ip_address.

response.name: 200 OK — Filter by Booking
200 OK — Filter by Client (15-Day Window)
200 OK — Filter by Supplier (30-Day Window)
400 Bad Request — No Context Group Provided
400 Bad Request — Multiple Context Groups Provided
401 Unauthorised
500 Internal Server Error
